variants.title: Filtrec D151T420AV Pressure Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec D151T420AV. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D151T420AV provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.5 mm, Length: 235.0 mm, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Viton
